name: AFSI Depreciation and Intangible Drilling Cost Adjustment

eligibility.description: Large corporations subject to the Corporate Alternative Minimum Tax (CAMT).

description: Reduces Adjusted Financial Statement Income (AFSI) by tax depreciation (Sec 167/168) and IDC (Sec 263c) instead of book depreciation/depletion for Corporate Alternative Minimum Tax (CAMT) purposes.
